narrative:
Michael Olise is a dynamic Right Winger representing Nigeria at the 2026 World Cup. His overall rating of 7.46/10 places him in the top 6% of right wingers in this tournament. This rating reflects both his club form over the last two seasons and his performances at this World Cup.

Olise's creative output is evident with 1.211 assists per 90 minutes and 2.825 key passes per 90 minutes at this World Cup. His expected assists (xA) per 90 minutes stands at 0.573, highlighting his playmaking ability. While his expected goals (xG) per 90 minutes is 0.417, his 1.614 shots per 90 minutes suggest he prioritizes creation over direct shooting.

With 223 minutes played, Olise clearly serves as a crucial creative outlet for Nigeria. Scouts and fans should continue to watch his exceptional playmaking, as evidenced by his high assists and key passes per 90. His ability to consistently create chances will be vital for his team's progression in the tournament.
